task_completion.description: Configure gradient factors to GF Low 30% and GF High 70% in the Preferences or Dive Planner settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Preferences or the Dive Planner panel, the GF Low field should display 30 and the GF High field should display 70.

task_completion.description: Set bottom SAC rate to 20 L/min and deco SAC rate to 15 L/min.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Dive Planner panel, the bottom SAC rate field should show 20 and the deco SAC rate field should show 15.

task_completion.description: Plan Dive 1 at 30m depth for 30 minutes bottom time using EAN32 (32% O2) in the Dive Planner, and save it to the logbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Dive Planner should show a dive profile reaching 30m depth with a 30 minute bottom time. The Available gases table should show a gas with 32% O2. After saving, a new dive entry should appear in the dive list.

task_completion.description: Plan Dive 2 at 40m depth for 25 minutes bottom time with EAN32 as bottom gas and EAN50 as deco gas, and save it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Dive Planner should show a dive profile reaching 40m depth with 25 minute bottom time. The Available gases table should show two gases: one with 32% O2 and one with 50% O2. A stepped decompression ascent profile should be visible. After saving, a second new dive entry should appear in the dive list.

task_completion.description: Plan Dive 3 at 50m depth for 20 minutes bottom time with Trimix 21/35 as bottom gas, EAN50 and pure Oxygen as deco gases, and save it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Dive Planner should show a dive profile reaching 50m depth with 20 minute bottom time. The Available gases table should show three gases: Trimix with 21% O2 and 35% He, a gas with 50% O2, and a gas with 100% O2. A stepped decompression ascent should be visible. After saving, a third new dive entry should appear in the dive list.

task_completion.description: Organize all three planned dives into a trip named 'Advanced Trimix Course - Dahab 2024'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive list, the three planned dives should be grouped under a trip header containing text like 'Advanced Trimix Course' or 'Dahab 2024' or similar.

task_completion.description: Set GPS coordinates for the Blue Hole dive site to approximately 28.57 N, 34.54 E.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive site details or the map view, GPS coordinates near 28.57 N, 34.54 E should be shown, or the map should display a pin near the Red Sea coast of Egypt.

task_completion.description: Set buddy 'Ahmed Hassan' on all three planned dives.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When selecting any of the three planned dives, the Buddy field in the dive details panel should show 'Ahmed Hassan'.

task_completion.description: Export the training plans as PDF to ~/Documents/tech_training_plan.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print or export dialog should be visible showing PDF output, or a file manager should show tech_training_plan.pdf in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface graphical user interface to plan all dives.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Subsurface application window with the Dive Planner interface, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: All three decompression plans were generated by the Subsurface Dive Planner, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dive profile graphs with decompression stops should be rendered by the application for each planned dive.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the logbook file via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening the .ssrf file in a text editor or using terminal commands like echo, sed, or vim to inject dive data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: This task requires planning 3 progressive technical dives using Subsurface's Dive Planner. Dive 1: 30m/30min on EAN32 (32% O2). Dive 2: 40m/25min with EAN32 bottom gas and EAN50 (50% O2) deco gas. Dive 3: 50m/20min with Trimix 21/35 (21% O2, 35% He) bottom gas, EAN50 and pure O2 (100%) deco gases. GF should be set to 30/70, SAC rates to 20/15. The three dives should be organized into a trip 'Advanced Trimix Course - Dahab 2024' at Blue Hole, Dahab, Egypt with GPS ~28.57N/34.54E and buddy 'Ahmed Hassan'. A PDF should be exported to ~/Documents/tech_training_plan.pdf.
